title: Nonagon
description: Nonagon is a exploration and discovery based mod pack with more biomes, ores, weapons, tools, armors, structures and more all for you and your friends to enjoy!
body:
> Nonagon is a exploration and discovery based mod pack with more biomes, ores, weapons, tools, armors, structures and more all for you and your friends to enjoy!
> 
> Embark on an epic journey with Nonagon, a modpack that redefines exploration in Minecraft! Discover new biomes, unearth exotic ores, and forge powerful weapons and armor to conquer the challenges that await. Explore breathtaking ruins and team up with friends to unravel their mysteries. Join us and let the exploration begin!
> 
>  
> 
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Swaix

Ko-Fi: https://ko-fi.com/swaix

Support Server: https://discord.gg/FwC2c6u3Jt

 

**Mods:**

~~- Waystones~~
- Better Advancements
- Better Dungeons
- Better Mine shafts
- Better Strongholds
- Better Ocean Monuments
- Better Nether Fortresses
- Better Witch Huts
- Better Desert Temples
- Better End Islands
- Better Jungle Temples
- Better Third Person
- Better Copper Armor/Tools
- Better Than Bunnies
- Better Than Llamas
- Better Treasure Map - Not on Fabric Version
~~- Better Wandering Trades~~
- Better Burning - Not on Fabric Version
- Yungs API
- Yungs Bridges
- Yungs Extras
- Yungs Menu Tweaks
- Diagonal Fences
- Clumps
- Journey Map
- Balm
- Biomes O' Plenty - [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty)
- Xaeros Minimap
- Xaeros Worldmap
- JEI
- JER
  
**Resource Packs (Included):**

- Icon Xaeros
- Better End Cities
- Fresh Waystones Texture
~~- Createful Plaques~~
- Visible Ores
- Motschen's Better Leaves
- Fresh Animations
~~- Fresh Animations Extensions~~
  
**Shaders (Included):**

- Complementary (reimagined)
- Complementary (unbound)
- BSL Shaders
- AstraLex Shaders
- Solas Shader
- Miniature Shader
- Exposa Shaders
